x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Performance Analytics indicators provide the historical trend data Now Assist uses for predictive scoring and anomaly detection. Instances with no PA indicators have no trend baseline for AI analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create Performance Analytics indicators for key ITSM metrics (incident volume, MTTR, SLA compliance) via pa_indicators_list.do. Configure scheduled data collection. Target: 10+ active indicators. PA data is the historical baseline Now Assist uses for trend-based AI insights.
